title: Google Samsung AI Smart Glasses | Fall 2026 Launch
subtitle: Audio-first AI glasses built on Android XR with Gemini AI. Warby Parker and Gentle Monster designs ship fall 2026.
content_html:
Google and Samsung revealed audio-first AI smart glasses at Google I/O 2026 built on Android XR with Gemini AI. The glasses support real-time translation, turn-by-turn navigation, and hands-free AI queries.

Warby Parker and Gentle Monster Designs

Google partnered with Warby Parker and Gentle Monster for consumer-facing frames. The glasses connect to Android smartphones via Bluetooth and are expected to launch fall 2026.

Competing With Meta Ray-Ban

The announcement positions Google and Samsung directly against Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses, which have sold over 1 million units since 2023.
